headline: Chipotle (CMG) Leaves Russell Top 200 And Joins Midcap Growth Indices
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) has been removed from certain Russell Top 200 indices following the latest Russell index rebalancing. At the same time, the company has been added to the Russell 1000 Dynamic, Midcap, and Midcap Growth indices. These changes alter how some index funds and other benchmark-aware investors may gain exposure to Chipotle. Chipotle Mexican Grill sits at an interesting point in its market story, with the stock at $35.0 and showing mixed return patterns. Shares are...
